ip_addr.description: IP address of the node for inter-node communication
ip_addr.title: Ip Addr

ssh_target.description: SSH target (address or hostname) for connecting to the node
ssh_target.title: Ssh Target

num_gpus.description: Number of GPUs available on this node
num_gpus.title: Num Gpus

nodes.description: List of nodes participating in the distributed job
nodes.title: Nodes

working_dir.description: Working directory on each node where the job will be executed
working_dir.title: Working Dir

env_setup.description: Command to activate the environment (e.g., source venv/bin/activate)
env_setup.title: Env Setup

output_dir.description: Base directory to store logs/scripts/config from the job. The final directory will be output_dir/name/date/time
output_dir.title: Output Dir

script.description: Path to the script to be executed
script.title: Script
